programme.desc: A rival coffee shop moves into town.

programme.title: E138 - Scaredy Bean/Wanted
programme.desc: Who's afraid of daft films about giant killer cats, blobs from outer space and thumb-size men who dance around in sugar bowls? Mr. Bean is. He's very afraid. A trip to the cinema makes Mr. Bean’s imagination play tricks on him.

programme.title: E149 - Lesson Plan 9 From Outer Space/ Balloon Salesman: Baboon/ Portal Kombat/Virtual Morta
programme.desc: Marvin the Martian has conquered Earth… but no one bothered to tell Bugs. Daffy Duck becomes a balloon salesman. Wile E. Coyote uses sci-fi portals to catch Roadrunner.

programme.title: E5 - Coffee Shop Wars/Boba Or Bo-Bust
programme.desc: A rival coffee shop moves into town.

programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.desc: Inspiring topics and positive initiatives from around the world that are driving meaningful change, empowering communities, fostering innovation, and creating a brighter, more hopeful future for people and the planet alike

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. The Truth or Fake is a short program designed to alert everyone to the dangers of fake news. The hosts emphasize that media literacy is a key part of the broad fight against disinformation.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E53

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E3 - Mindful Twinkle
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Ultimate Pretend Play Day!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate pretend play day with JJ! When the cookies go missing, it's up to Detective JJ & his sidekick Bingo to follow the clues & solve the case. Then, when JJ gets nervous on his first carousel ride, Mom helps him unlock his imagination & he becomes a brave knight on a valiant steed! The pretend play continues as Captain JJ & first mate YoYo set sail on the high seas to find a lost sock. From playing chef to being a Turtle Scout, you can be anything!

programme.title: E2 - From Mail To Outer Space!
programme.desc: Blippi is on adventures big & small, from the mail to outer space! First, Blippi shrinks down to go inside the BlippiMobile's engine to fix a problem. Then, he follows a letter he wrote on its entire journey through the post office to Grandpa Blippi’s mailbox! After that, he flies into outer space on a rocket, floating in zero gravity & performing a space walk. He even joins a boulder on its exciting trip down a river to become a grain of sand!

programme.title: E2 - Baby John's Ultimate Playdate Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for some ultimate playdate fun with Baby John! First, he & his family love to play hide & seek, but where is everyone hiding? Then, Miss Hannah teaches all the kids at school a funny face game where they take turns making silly faces! The fun continues as building a treehouse takes a lot of work, but Baby John & his family learn how to work as a team to build a super cool new one!

programme.title: E5 - Imagination & Problem Solving Fun!
programme.desc: Join Baby John for some imagination & problem-solving fun! Oh no, Teddy is missing! But don't worry, Mom, Dad, Jack & Jill are all there to help Baby John search for him & solve the mystery. Then, dressed as pigs, Baby John, Jack & Jill use their imagination to re-enact the classic 'Three Little Pigs' story, with Dad playing the Big Bad Wolf! The problem-solving continues as the family helps guide Jill through the experience of losing her first tooth.

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Favorite Classic Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: Get ready to dance to all of JJ's favorite classic sing-alongs! Try to keep up as the kids groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' going a little bit faster with each verse! Then, have fun tumbling off the stage as they play a silly game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The party continues as they play the 'Who Took the Cookie?' game & march along to 'John Jacob Jingleheimer Schmidt.' It's a dance party full of timeless, interactive fun!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E2 - Baby John's Ultimate Playdate Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for some ultimate playdate fun with Baby John! First, he & his family love to play hide & seek, but where is everyone hiding? programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E19 - 愛過之後 帶著清醒歸來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E48 - 史上最完美身材男嘉賓亮相
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E2 - Disinformation Versus Democracy

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: South Korean actor Kim Nam-gil embarks on a journey with his companion, Lee Sang-yoon. Their first destination is the Punch Bowl village, a place marked by the pain of the divided Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: E21 - Duck Schnitzel With Sweet Potato Waffles
programme.desc: Chef Deborah takes the chicken and waffles to the next level with her duck schnitzel and sweet potato waffles. She marinates and fries the duck, then mixes baked sweet potatoes with egg, milk and spices.

programme.title: E2 - Spinach Feta Pie & Baklava
programme.desc: Drawing on his travels, Jake puts his twist on boreka hand pies, filled with tender white beans, spinach and feta. This recipe can work as a side dish or is hearty enough to be the main course.

programme.title: E2 - Spinach Feta Pie & Baklava
programme.desc: Drawing on his travels, Jake puts his twist on boreka hand pies, filled with tender white beans, spinach and feta. This recipe can work as a side dish or is hearty enough to be the main course.

programme.title: E21 - Duck Schnitzel With Sweet Potato Waffles

programme.title: E5 - Senior Cyst-Izen
programme.desc: Anthony is trying to move on from his troubled past, but his huge thigh lump is holding him back. Mary has a mysterious 70-year-old bump that amazes Drs. Lee and Tomassian.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: Novelist Sarah becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: E3 - Abandonment Issues
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca ride their bikes through the backroads of Burnett in the Hill Country to check out a two-storey abandoned house in the woods. It's an unfinished renovation that's seen better days.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: Novelist Sarah becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: Trip to India
programme.desc: For hamsters' day, Zoe and Milo want to surprise Alim by making confetti to throw on their little friend. But Alim knows a place on earth where people celebrate by throwing something more interesting than confetti up in the air. Our heroes land in Rajasthan, India.

programme.title: Flour
programme.desc: Ahh something smells so good, what is it? Oh it's Hepi and Briko's fresh new ideas! What are they up to now?

programme.title: Seniorita
programme.desc: Senior has received a love letter! Sprinter is sure that a supervillain is behind it since Senior is old! He can not receive love letters, can he?

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: Old Roads
programme.desc: The detention team follows their clue to a haunted church that supposedly reveals your darkest fears. The team splits up to cover more ground. Scared and alone, they realise someone or something is following them.

programme.title: The Pitcher Plant and a Very Sweet Trap
programme.desc: The carnivorous pitcher plants have evolved to trap and digest insects. The small creatures are lured in with sweet nectar. The biggest pitchers are found on the slopes of Mount Kinabalu in Borneo. These can hold over a litre of fluid.

programme.title: Bianca Ciocirlan: Hoverboard Performer
programme.desc: Young hoverboard artist Bianca Ciocirlan shares how she became the best in the world, achieving forty-five pirouettes on a hoverboard in thirty seconds. Bianca is also a professional hoverboard performer and former figure skater.

programme.title: Reach for the Tabletop
programme.desc: Jesse, Julia and Ian decide to make their own video game-themed board game but can't stop pranking each other.

programme.title: Making the Grade
programme.desc: To qualify for this year's British Championships, Sophie has to pass a difficult technical test. Elites, James and Ekraj, are also aiming for the British Championships, and their coach Karen has called in a surprise mentor to help them nail some tricky new skills.

programme.title: The Pitcher Plant and a Very Sweet Trap

programme.title: The Deadly Zombie Fungus
programme.desc: The Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They enter the insect's body and digest it from the inside. They can even steer its mind and make it do things that help spread the spores further.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.desc: Albert's obsessed with Sherlock Holmes and believes he shares his hero's detective skills. The others aren't so sure-except Jessi. When the class hamster vanishes from a locked cage, Albert takes the case, Jessi by his side. Robbie's the prime suspect... but is he guilty?

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: E9 - Power Crash
programme.desc: Joe races to England to snap up a new plane, leaving Mikey to handle a crisis that grounds the Electra.

programme.title: E10 - Breakdown
programme.desc: Graeme fumbles his first landing in the Electra and Adam rescues a stranded C-46.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1 - We’re back
programme.desc: TV's most savage social experiment returns as Search4Hurt starts its mission to find the fittest everyday Aussies to join their hybrid sporting team, starting with HurtCamp.

programme.title: E1 - Murchison GeoRegion
programme.desc: Western Australia’s Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its’ ancient landscapes and brilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back to the earth’s beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: E8 - Indonesia
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in the streets and sulfur mining in the mouth of a volcano. With all of these wild and dangerous activities, can Rooftop and Catfish handle the heat of Indonesia?

programme.title: Sports[Live]
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Les unes de la presse[Live]
programme.desc: Une revue des grands titres, éditos, photos et dessins du jour issus de la presse française et internationale. Les chroniqueurs passent en revue les titres les plus marquants.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: E10 - The Best Puff Pastry Products On The Market
programme.desc: The show's team tests a dozen puff pastries to identify the crispiest and airiest ones, revealing significant disparities. Also: should sulfites in food be demonized; celebrating 50 years of Montreal's community gardens; the aromas of dahl.

programme.title: E6 - From Marseille To The Arcachon Basin
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde investigates the difference between Mediterranean and Atlantic influences in decoration.

programme.title: E10 - The Best Puff Pastry Products On The Market
programme.desc: The show's team tests a dozen puff pastries to identify the crispiest and airiest ones, revealing significant disparities. Also: should sulfites in food be demonized; celebrating 50 years of Montreal's community gardens; the aromas of dahl.

programme.title: E7 - A Rendezvous With The Moon
programme.desc: Matthieu Fournier takes a trip upstream to understand the complexity of karst hydrogeology in the Swiss Jura. Plus a report that takes us meet small farmers and discover the fascinating role the Moon plays in their daily lives.

programme.title: E16 - The Soul Of The Beaufortain
programme.desc: In the northwest of Savoie, the village of Beaufort gave its name to the famous cheese of the same name. These magnificent green alpine pastures, ideal for livestock farming, are also a true land of champions. Marie Bochet, daughter of alpine farmers and a para-alpine skier with multiple medals, is one of the best ambassadors of her native massif.

programme.title: E114
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E5 - Hluhluwe-Imfolozi
programme.desc: In the heart of Zululand, South Africa, lies the oldest game reserve on the African continent – Hluhluwe-iMfolozi. Here, Southern white rhinos have found protection from people in times of turmoil. Hunted almost to extinction at the end of the 19th century, the park’s establishment gave rhinos a lifeline – breeding them back from extinction.

programme.title: E2 - Lean on Me
programme.desc: Observe blossoming friendships and interspecies bonds in nursery school, and peek inside a bromance among junior-school buds Valentino, Yutris and Madara. See distractible Beni lean into his love of food and get a beating from a more-senior pupil.

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E5 - Hluhluwe-Imfolozi
programme.desc: In the heart of Zululand, South Africa, lies the oldest game reserve on the African continent – Hluhluwe-iMfolozi. Here, Southern white rhinos have found protection from people in times of turmoil. Hunted almost to extinction at the end of the 19th century, the park’s establishment gave rhinos a lifeline – breeding them back from extinction.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: This time, Jamie shows us a roast dinner cooked all together in one pot, cutting down on washing up but never on flavour; and his store-cupboard version of a speedy carbonara that can use up whatever veg you have to hand. He shares two ways to use pre-packed ingredients to make crowd-pleasing starters or sides, and two stars of Middle Eastern cuisine show how store-cupboard spices can transform everyday ingredients into truly mouth-watering meals.

programme.title: Love Lies
programme.desc: 'Love, once believed, is real.' Despite being swindled out of a large sum of money, the well-known gynecologist Yu still insisted that she was in love. Yu, who had been widowed for several years, met Joe, who was disguised as a middle-aged French petroleum engineer and widower, on a dating app, not knowing that he was part of an online scam group. Not only was Yu immersed in the online romance, but Joe also found pleasure and satisfaction in creating romantic experiences for Yu. Two initially unlikable people gradually changed through this online romance that began with deception.

programme.title: Ama Gloria
